005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BCDot;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetIdle;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetIdle;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateFastOnce;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeDigest;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterAddToBonusVelocity;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterWaitForSpinUp;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
035import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
036import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
037import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
038import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
039import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
040import com.stuypulse.robot.util.PathUtil.AutonConfig;
041
042import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
043import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
044import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
045import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
046import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
047import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
048import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine.Direction;
049
050/**
051 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
052 * 
053 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
054 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
055 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
056 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
057 */
058public class RobotContainer {
059
060    // Gamepads
061    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
062
063    // Subsystem
064    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
065
066    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
067
068    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
069
070    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
071
072    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
073
074    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
075
076    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
077
078    // Autons
079    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
080
081    // Robot container
082
083    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
084    public RobotContainer() {
085        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
086        configureDefaultCommands();
087        configureButtonBindings();
088        configureAutons();
089        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
090    }
091
092    /** ************ */
093    /** DEFAULTS ** */
094    /** ************ */
095    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
096        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
097        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
098    }
099
100    /***************/
101    /*** BUTTONS ***/
102    /***************/
103
104    /**
105     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
106   */
107    private void configureButtonBindings() {
108        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
109        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
110        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
111
112        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
113        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
114        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
115
116        rightTrigger.onTrue(
117            new SwerveDriveAlignToHub()
118                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
119                .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
120                .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
121                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
122                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
123
124        driver.y().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
125        driver.rightBumper()
126            .onTrue(
127                new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone()
128                    .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
129                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
130                    .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
131                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
132                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
133        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the tower
134        driver.a()
135            .whileTrue(
136                new SwerveDriveXMode()
137                    .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
138                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
139                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
140                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
141        // Top Right Paddle
142        driver.b()
143            .onTrue(
144                new HandoffSetIdle()
145                    .alongWith(
146                        new FeederSetIdle(),
147                        new IntakeSetHomingDown(),
148                        Commands.runOnce(
149                                () -> new SwerveDriveXMode().cancel())));
150        // Bottom Left Paddle
151        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
152
153        driver.povLeft().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
154        
155        driver.povUp()
156            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(50));
157        driver.povDown()
158            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(-50));
159
160    }
161
162    /**************/
163    /*** AUTONS ***/
164    /**************/
165
166    /**
167     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
168     */
169     public void configureAutons() {
170        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
171        // AutonConfig LBFerry = new AutonConfig("LB Ferry", LBFerry::new,
172        // "LB to N Ferry",
173        // "N to LT Ferry",
174        // "LT Hub Ferry",
175        // "N to Depot Ferry");
176        // LBFerry.register(autonChooser);
177        // AutonConfig RBFerry = new AutonConfig("RB Ferry", RBFerry::new,
178        // "RB to N Ferry",
179        // "N to RT Ferry",
180        // "RT Hub Ferry",
181        // "N to Outpost Ferry");
182        // RBFerry.register(autonChooser);
183        // AutonConfig LBMid = new AutonConfig("LB Mid", LBMid::new,
184        // "LB to N Mid",
185        // "LB Return Mid");
186        // LBMid.register(autonChooser);
187        // AutonConfig LBStraight = new AutonConfig("LB Straight", LBStraight::new,
188        // "LB to N Straight",
189        // "N to LB Straight");
190        // LBStraight.register(autonChooser);
191        // AutonConfig RBStraight = new AutonConfig("RB Straight", RBStraight::new,
192        // "RB to N Straight",
193        // "N to RB Straight");
194        // RBStraight.register(autonChooser);
195        // AutonConfig RBMid = new AutonConfig("RB Mid", RBMid::new,
196        // "RB to N Mid",
197        // "RB Return Mid",
198        // "RB to Outpost Mid");
199        // RBMid.register(autonChooser);
200        // AutonConfig TwoMeterPath = new AutonConfig("Two Meter Path",
201        // TwoMeterPath::new,
202        // "2 meter path");
203        // TwoMeterPath.register(autonChooser);
204        // AutonConfig OutpostOnly = new AutonConfig("Outpost Only", OutpostOnly::new,
205        // "Outpost");
206        // OutpostOnly.register(autonChooser);
207        // AutonConfig RBOuttake = new AutonConfig("RB Outtake", RBOuttake::new,
208        // "RB to N Outtake",
209        // "N to RB Outtake");
210        // RBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
211        // AutonConfig LBOuttake = new AutonConfig("LB Outtake", LBOuttake::new,
212        // "LB to N Outtake",
213        // "N to LB Outtake");
214        // LBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
215        // AutonConfig LBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("LB Midline Sweep",
216        // LBMidlineSweep::new,
217        // "LB to N Midline",
218        // "LN Sweep Midline");
219        // LBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
220        // AutonConfig RBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("RB Midline Sweep",
221        // RBMidlineSweep::new,
222        // "RB to N Midline",
223        // "RN Sweep Midline");
224        // RBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
225        // AutonConfig LBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBDisrupt::new,
226        // "LB to CN Disrupt",
227        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
228        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
229        // "LB Disrupt Return");
230        // LBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
231        // AutonConfig RBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("RB Disrupt", RBDisrupt::new,
232        // "RB to CN Disrupt",
233        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
234        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
235        // "RB Disrupt Return");
236        // RBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
237        // AutonConfig LT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("LT Disrupt", LTDisrupt::new,
238        // "LT to N Disrupt",
239        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
240        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
241        // "LT Side Push Disrupt",
242        // "LT Around Disrupt",
243        // "LT Back Push Disrupt");
244        // LT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
245        // AutonConfig RT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("RT Disrupt", RTDisrupt::new,
246        // "RT to N Disrupt",
247        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
248        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
249        // "RT Side Push Disrupt",
250        // "RT Around Disrupt",
251        // "RT Back Push Disrupt");
252        // RT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
253
254        AutonConfig LBToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Center", BCDot::new,
255            "LB to BC Center"
256        );
257        LBToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
258        AutonConfig LBToBCLeft = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Left", BCDot::new,
259            "LB to BC Left"
260        );
261        LBToBCLeft.register(autonChooser);
262        AutonConfig RBToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Center", BCDot::new,
263            "RB to BC Center"
264        );
265        RBToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
266        AutonConfig RBToBCRight = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Right", BCDot::new,
267            "RB to BC Right"
268        );
269        RBToBCRight.register(autonChooser);
270
271        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
272        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
273        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
274        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
275        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
276        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
277        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
278        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
279        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
280        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
281        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
282        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
283        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
284        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
285        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
286        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
287        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
288    }
289
290    /**
291     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
292     * @return The command to run in autonomous
293     */
294    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
295        return autonChooser.getSelected();
296    }
297}
